channel.title: elizaOS Daily Intelligence
channel.description: Daily facts and insights from the elizaOS ecosystem

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-06-04
item.description:
Summary: Development on June 4 prioritized cloud infrastructure stability and the rollout of the 'Odysseus' platform architecture, alongside significant DeFi plugin advancement for the Solana ecosystem. Organizational clarity was established regarding the separation of ElizaOS from Hyperia and Hyperforge projects.

GitHub Activity:

  • release: promote develop → main (Cloud V2 sync) (merged)
  • feat(plugin-task-coordinator): odysseus-style orchestrator UI (open)
  • orchestrator: sub-agent completion narration drops/garbles the deliverable (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #-discussion: Clarification of organizational boundaries showing Hyperia/Hyperforge as separate from ElizaOS. Introduction of Neverbell, an early-stage project for financial AI agents....
  • #dev-chat: Technical debate regarding multi-protocol DeFi abstraction layers versus protocol-specific implementations for AI agent wallets....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-06-03
item.description:
Summary: Development on June 2-3 focused on significant architectural stabilization of ElizaCloud and the core orchestrator, alongside a major community-led effort to integrate the Kamino Solana protocol. Key technical updates include the promotion of the Cloud V2 stack to main and the resolution of duplicate reply race conditions.

GitHub Activity:

  • release: promote develop → main (Cloud V2 sync) (merged)
  • Claude/agentic views surface (merged)
  • orchestrator: sub-agent completion narration drops/garbles the deliverable (open)
  • feat(ui): continuous-chat overlay + restored app shell (draft)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Clarification of the ecosystem architecture (ElizaOS vs ElizaCloud vs Milady vs Waifu) and technical planning for the Kamino Solana plugin....
  • #general: Debate regarding DeFi integration strategies: multi-chain abstraction layers (presented by Smeltor) versus protocol-specific 'go-to-market' plugins (suggested by n4vnt)....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-06-02
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS project focus transitioned toward high-performance DeFi integration architecture and the launch of the /orchestrator coding workbench. Development remains active despite community concerns regarding team shifts toward the waifu.fun ecosystem.

GitHub Activity:

  • Claude/agentic views surface (merged)
  • feat(orchestrator): live Claude-Code-style coding workbench (merged)
  • release: promote develop → main (Cloud V2 sync) (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy debate on DeFi abstraction layers (Smeltor) vs. protocol-specific plugins (N4vnt). Clarification on project activity and token relationships for waifu.fun and ElizaOS....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-06-01
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is undergoing significant architectural stabilization, including the integration of plugin-solana into the core repository and the introduction of the Arsenal Decision Engine for DeFi agents. Recent activity is dominated by infrastructure hardening, SOC2 compliance efforts, and a transition to containerized provisioning.

GitHub Activity:

  • Secure destructive actions, MCP spawning, and web functionality (merged)
  • Fleet-upgrade reconciler for blue/green deployments (open)
  • Hardening SOC2 verification controls (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Introduction of Arsenal Quant Decision Engine for DeFAI; community members inquiring about project progress and team commitment to the ElizaOS token....
  • #coders: Technical issues flagged for investigation by Stan; recruitment for operational partners in the US, Canada, and UAE for non-technical roles....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-31
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing major codebase reorganization and infrastructure hardening, specifically consolidating the Solana wallet integration and implementing SOC2 security controls. While the core team focus has partially shifted to waifu.fun, development continues on community-driven plugins like Kamino and enhanced agent orchestration logic.

GitHub Activity:

  • Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails (merged)
  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • feat: add NEAR AI inference provider (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #-discussion: Technical discussions on the reorganization of Solana plugins and the development of plugin-kamino. Community members expressed concerns over token value and team participation in the market....
  • #coders: Developers shared experiences building multi-agent platforms and troubleshot Docker image deployment issues on ElizaCloud involving unexpected auth prompts....
  • #general: Recruitment advertisements for Sunflower Polygon Team and coordination support positions were posted, alongside hackathon announcements from Mantle Network....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-30
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS has primarily focused on infrastructure hardening and maturing the AI agent framework through the implementation of SOC2 compliance and enhanced security scanning. The project also successfully integrated significant community-led plugins for Solana transaction security and Base treasury management.

GitHub Activity:

  • Improved Agent Logic (merged)
  • Enhanced Security SOC2 (merged)
  • Add NEAR AI inference provider (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #-discussion: Discussions focused on business development with SKALE Labs, the closure of token migration windows, and a deep technical analysis of 0DTE options trading strategies based on dealer hedging dynamics....
  • #announcements: Hackathon and recruitment activity was high, with Mantle Network announcing a $100K AI-focused hackathon and the Sunflower Polygon Team looking for beta testers and smart contract developers....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-29
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a foundational hardening phase, focusing on cross-platform stability for headless environments and maturing security through SOC2 compliance and SLSA build provenance. Significant development is directed toward local inference optimizations for Intel hardware and unifying the plugin architecture under a single remote/direct mode model.

GitHub Activity:

  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)
  • feat: add NEAR AI inference provider (merged)
  • Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #general: Clarification provided regarding token rumors; it was confirmed that no new token has been launched. Continued discussion on open-source project continuity after labs became defunct....
  • #coders: Focus was entirely on hackathon announcements and professional recruitment. Significant self-promotion from full-stack AI developers and recruitment for the Sunflower Polygon project....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-28
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is prioritizing platform hardening and security through the implementation of SOC2 controls and SLSA build provenance. Development efforts are focused on maturing AI agent infrastructure, including real-time sentiment analysis capabilities and expanding the ecosystem with decentralised identity standards.

GitHub Activity:

  • harden SOC2 verification controls (merged)
  • Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails (merged)
  • add NEAR AI inference provider (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Clarification provided regarding project continuity; despite labs closing, the open-source initiative remains active. Community members are sharing professional portfolios and AI-focused project compl...
  • #coders: Successful testing of AgentKey MCP for autonomous research and real-time community sentiment analysis monitoring....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-27
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS project remains active as a community-led open-source initiative following the closure of the 'labs' company, with recent efforts focused on launching the 'waifu' economic agent launchpad and upgrading agent ownership models.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails (merged)
  • Planner quality: explicit chat-recall requests pick SHELL over SEARCH_MESSAGES (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Clarification of project status following company shutdown; reports of bot spam and deployment constraints on Linux/JavaScript environments....
  • #general: Introductions from full-stack and RAG developers; recruitment for onchain game projects testing and Solidity development....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-26
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS successfully released version 2.0.2, introducing a critical 'Owner+Agent' identity model and stabilizing cloud infrastructure. Technical focus has shifted to resolving high-memory overhead for modern Qwen architectures and fixing deployment failures on the Waifu economic agent launchpad.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • Planner quality: explicit chat-recall requests pick SHELL over SEARCH_MESSAGES (open)
  • Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Community focus on recruitment for an onchain game project and introductions from developers specializing in RAG systems and autonomous pipelines....
  • #coders: Market analysis provided for BTC, SOL, and XRP, noting institutional inflows into XRP ETFs and whale rotation as the week's theme....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-25
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS has officially launched 'waifu', the first economic agent launchpad, marking a significant milestone in agent-powered infrastructure. Simultaneously, the framework transition to v2.0.2 is stabilizing with a major focus on the 'Owner+Agent' identity model and local inference optimizations for Intel hardware.

GitHub Activity:

  • Restore packages/os/linux/variants/milady-tails — per Shaw's go-ahead (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)
  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the launch of 'waifu', the first economic agent launchpad, and technical details regarding its construction by Sol the Architect....
  • #general: Clarification on token liquidity (BSC) and the definitive end of the ai16z-to-ElizaOS migration window....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-24
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS successfully released version 2.0.2, pivoting towards an 'Owner+Agent' identity model while hardening cloud and mobile infrastructure. Concurrently, community discussions centered on the closure of the Babylon project and the end of the ai16z-to-elizaOS token migration period.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Discussions focused on token liquidity on BSC, the termination of the ai16z migration, and security research regarding AI agents with direct wallet access....
  • general: Technical deep dive into the difficulties of containerizing VoiceAI platforms, specifically regarding GPU orchestration for real-time inference....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-23
item.description:
Summary: The project achieved major milestones with the launch of the waifu.fun agentic launchpad and the v2.0.2 core release, which standardizes the 'Owner+Agent' identity model. Strategic development has pivoted away from the Babylon airdrop to focus exclusively on hardware abstraction and elizaOS performance on RISC-V and local inference platforms.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)
  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus was on the waifu.fun launch and a flux of new developers offering expertise in Web3, full-stack AI, and digital art....
  • #technical-discussions: Detailed deep-dive into containerizing VoiceAI platforms, specifically separating services for inference, API, and database to maintain low latency....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-22
item.description:
Summary: The project successfully reached major milestones with the release of elizaOS v2.0.2 and significant technical breakthroughs in hardware abstraction on RISC-V architectures. Strategic focus has shifted exclusively toward elizaOS development, resulting in the cancellation of the Babylon airdrop due to budget constraints.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • [WIP] First-party Satellites and dynamic view host bridge (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus centers on the release of elizaOS v2.0 and the shift toward native-apps integration. There is a high volume of new users requesting onboarding resources and live video demonstrations....
  • #coders: Technical debate regarding the containerization of VoiceAI platforms. Experts recommend multi-container architectures (separating inference, API, and DB) over monolithic single-container deployments t...

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-21
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS reached significant hardware milestones by booting on an emulated RISC-V chip while simultaneously shipping v2.0.2 to standardize agent identity and cloud infrastructure. Strategic focus has pivoted exclusively toward core elizaOS development, resulting in the cancellation of planned project airdrops.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore(release): develop → main (v2.0.2) (merged)
  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the Eliza E1 emulated chip milestone and the strategic pivot away from the Babylon airdrop to focus on elizaOS as a primary eth/sol-style utility token....
  • #coders: Announcements of new DeFi plugins and significant documentation requests for v2.0.0 features. Developers are actively coordinating on trading bot integrations....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-20
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS v2.0.0 was officially released, accompanied by core team clarifications on tokenomics and the project's legal separation from Milady. High-intensity GitHub activity focused on cross-platform stability, including a major secrets vault implementation and hardware-specific optimizations for Intel and Android.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus was on the v2.0.0 release and detailed clarifications on $elizaOS token utility, buyback mechanisms (focusing on profitability first), and governance (none currently formal)....
  • #coders: Developer networking dominated, with introductions from full-stack/AI engineers specializing in RAG, LLM orchestration, and trading bot SDK integrations....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-19
item.description:
Summary: May 19 saw a focus on core infrastructure hardening and cross-platform stability, particularly for Windows and ARM64 environments. Developer activity remains high with numerous technical demonstrations and the launch of the ElizaOS deploy CLI foundation.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python (merged)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on strategic partnerships and the introduction of the BYTE Protocol. High volume of developer networking and full-stack engineer introductions....
  • #coders: Technical stack demonstrations including Next.js 15 and React 19 implementations with LangGraph and CrewAI agents....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-18
item.description:
Summary: Development activity on May 17-18 centered on hardening cross-platform infrastructure, particularly for Linux Live USB, Android native inference, and CI/CD reliability. While commercial partnerships for SME solutions were announced, community frustration exists regarding unresolved migration issues from ai16z to ElizaOS.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat: connector capability detection + orchestrator hardening + sub-agent UX redesign (open)
  • vulkan: Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M bandwidth-efficiency cliff on Lunar Lake iGPU (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on migration difficulties from ai16z and networking for full-stack developers specializing in AI tools....
  • #coders: Introduction of gaming concepts for AI agents and status updates on community activity levels....
  • #partners: Discussions on AI-related coins gaining traction on the Base blockchain and cautious market optimism....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-17
item.description:
Summary: The period was marked by the announcement of a major commercial partnership with Secure Blockchain Development Corp. and technical progress on specialized AI agent escrow protocols and model fine-tuning. However, community tension is rising regarding the unconfirmed release date for ElizaOS V3.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • plugin-sql runtime-migrator missing drizzle pgTable defs (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus was split between a commercial partnership for SME solutions and frustration over the V3 release timeline. Some users expressed skepticism regarding the formality of the new venture....
  • #general: Technical discussions regarding AI Agent Escrow protocols on Base and troubleshooting high Neynar API credit usage....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-16
item.description:
Summary: Development activity on May 16 concentrated on foundational hardening, including cross-platform vault integration and critical bug fixes for ElizaOS. Community discussions highlighted new partnership curiosity and the introduction of an AI agent escrow protocol on Base Mainnet.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Light activity focused on greetings and a brief confirmation of active work on 'eliza OZ'. Curiosity was expressed regarding a significant partnership announcement....
  • #coders: Introduction of a simple escrow primitive for AI agents on Base, designed to maintain auditable incentive structures while avoiding trust logic in the runtime....
